data.title: Update preplanning SKILL.md Step 5a to read RESEARCH_FINDINGS comments and extend PREPLANNING_CONTEXT schema
data.description:
## Story
eaa2-ca1c — PREPLANNING_CONTEXT research compounding across pipeline

## Goal
Extend preplanning SKILL.md to:
1. Add schema_version + researchFindings array to the PREPLANNING_CONTEXT schema definition
2. In Step 5a, read RESEARCH_FINDINGS: ticket comments from the epic and merge into researchFindings array
3. In the post-decomposition research phase, skip WebSearch for verified entries, light-verify partially_verified, fully research unverified/contradicted

## Implementation

### PREPLANNING_CONTEXT schema extension
Extend the schema definition to include:
- `schema_version`: integer (current: 2) for forward/backward compat
- `researchFindings`: array of `{capability, status, source, skill_name, timestamp}` entries

### Step 5a merge
After loading existing preplanning context, scan epic comments for the last `RESEARCH_FINDINGS:` prefixed comment. Parse JSON array; merge entries into PREPLANNING_CONTEXT researchFindings array. Treat missing/corrupt comments as empty array (fail-open).

### Research phase skip logic
Before calling WebSearch for each capability:
- `verified` → skip entirely
- `partially_verified` → light WebSearch (1 query, spot-check)
- `unverified` / `contradicted` → full WebSearch verification
- Empty array → full verification for all capabilities

## Acceptance Criteria
1. test_preplanning_research_findings_array_mentioned passes
2. test_preplanning_schema_version_field passes
3. test_preplanning_skip_verified_capability passes
4. test_preplanning_research_findings_merge passes
5. All tests in tests/skills/test-preplanning-research-findings-schema.sh GREEN

## Files to Modify
- plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md (UPDATE — schema extension + Step 5a merge + research phase skip logic)

## Dependencies
Depends on 58d5-577b (RED test must exist before implementation)
Depends on 1873-873f (brainstorm must define RESEARCH_FINDINGS: format first)
